name: mojs
when_to_use: For decorative motion graphics effects: burst/explosion animations, particle confetti, shape transitions, celebration effects, or organic motion patterns
forbidden_patterns: Do NOT call .play() or .replay() on mo.js objects — Remotion controls timing
PREFER implementing effects with Remotion primitives (spring, interpolate) inspired by mo.js patterns
Mo.js may have compatibility issues with SSR — test in Remotion Studio first
remotion_integration_notes: Mo.js is best used as inspiration for burst/particle effects. Implement the actual effects using Remotion's spring() and interpolate() with trigonometric calculations for radial particle layouts.
